title: Darthome Set Of 2 Glass Leaf Plates 28x3x28cm Assorted Tropical Leaves Green Decor Serving Platters
features: Perfect Size & Durable – With dimensions of W28cm x H3cm x D28cm and a weight of 850g, these glass plates are spacious and durable, providing both function and style.
Set of 2 Glass Leaf Plates – This elegant set of two glass plates features stunning Bonito and Maya leaf designs in metallic light and dark green, perfect for adding a touch of nature to your décor.
Versatile Serving Platters & Decorative Pieces – These plates are ideal for serving snacks, appetisers, or as eye-catching decorative centrepieces to elevate your table settings or displays.
Intricate Metallic Detailing – Crafted with intricate detailing and a metallic finish, the green tones create a sophisticated and natural flair, perfect for both special occasions and everyday use.
Unique Assorted Set – The set includes one metallic light green and one metallic dark green leaf plate, offering an eye-catching contrast that complements any home decor.
description: Bring a touch of nature to your home with this Set of 2 Green Leaf Plates. Crafted from glass, these plates feature stunning Bonito and Maya leaf designs with a metallic finish, making them perfect for serving snacks, appetisers, or as decorative centrepieces. Their intricate detailing and green tones add elegance and a natural flair to any table setting or display. Versatile and eye-catching, they’re ideal for special occasions or everyday use.
